summary: Team activity across recent meetings and emails.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed two design proposals for the knowledge website, finding Joker's version too similar to current site and preferring Joseph's more editorial layout with more articles displayed. Decided to combine elements from both, focusing on showing more articles and bringing indices to the homepage.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank for China executive programs in AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed website menu feedback, brochure updates, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, titled 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global', with op-eds from deans and case studies, aiming for early September launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed campaign results for Asia Start, discussed launching a new Intelligent China program with a website and SCM campaign, and decided to test AI vs traditional strategies.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in shaping market cooperation.

actionItems.text: Mark specific feedback on Joker's design
actionItems.detail: Sit down for half an hour to mark feedback for Joker to incorporate.

actionItems.text: Incorporate feedback into design
actionItems.detail: Make changes based on team feedback and own judgment.

actionItems.detail: Share the HTML file for the inspirational layout.

actionItems.detail: Need detailed description of each conversion event (form submit, download report, etc.) to verify tracking is correct.

actionItems.detail: Identify topics like AI in China, EVs in China, smart manufacturing for SEO targeting.

actionItems.detail: Understand target audience demographics, company types, and geographic regions to inform SEO and content.

actionItems.detail: Joseph to take a closer look and share feedback; Julie may also provide input.

actionItems.detail: Julie to update ballpark figures like NBA cohort size from 700 to ~275.

actionItems.detail: Julie has a meeting with Lee this afternoon at 3; others welcome to join.

actionItems.detail: Julie has one article ready and will send it for team review.

actionItems.detail: Jimmy to revise the press release to include the 10 takeaways from Shun Tian Shu's speech.

actionItems.detail: Kayleigh to respond to Carnegie's questions about plan, budget, and audience.

actionItems.text: Call Impactable agency tomorrow night
actionItems.detail: Kayleigh has a call scheduled with Impactable, a US-based social media agency.

actionItems.text: Expedite social media agency selection
actionItems.detail: Team to push for faster agency selection to avoid delays; consider Media Minds as top candidate.

actionItems.detail: Team to wait for Li Wei to send sections to translate before splitting the work.

actionItems.detail: For review by all parties.

actionItems.detail: To add industry perspective to the report.

actionItems.text: Confirm with Tech in Asia and Tyson events about launching the report
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Meetings scheduled tomorrow to discuss theme and feasibility.

actionItems.text: Launch Asia Start November campaign with two routes: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
actionItems.detail: Joseph will use AI strategy, Daisy will use traditional strategy for the first month, then decide on one approach.

actionItems.text: Complete website for Intelligent China program.
actionItems.detail: Website is nearly ready; Joseph will work with Daisy and Contran to finalize.

actionItems.text: Start SCM campaign for Intelligent China program after website is done.
actionItems.detail: Simultaneously with website completion, begin planning the campaign; decide on AI or traditional route.

actionItems.detail: Miguel Ochosa requests confirmation of partnership by end of July to allow time for planning, speaker prep, and recruitment.

decisions.text: Remove videos as a separate category; they will be dispersed by topic.
Combine elements from Joker's and Joseph's designs, favoring more articles displayed and indices on homepage.
Keep school menu at top left and knowledge menu centered.
Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships for initial SEO and marketing efforts.
Intelligent China webpage will launch this week; marketing will drive traffic starting July.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, either incorporating the 10 points or turning it into a 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time sensitivity.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Professor Leeway and op-eds from both deans and possibly an industry perspective.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Target launch: early September 2026, at either Tech in Asia (Sep 15-16) or Tyson (Sep 29-30) in Singapore.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Asia Start November campaign will test AI vs traditional strategies for the first month.
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and focuses on module one (Beijing) initially.
Global Marcom's report is finalized and will be sent to Shouhuo.
CKGSB-EuroCham event introduction is approved; proceed to invite Prof. Li Wei.
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: CKGSB-EuroCham event collaboration on EV
